title: geranium tuberosum var. linearilobum
intro: Geranium tuberosum var. linearilobum, also known as the tuberous geranium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been known to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Geranium tuberosum var. linearilobum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve digestion, making it a popular herb in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
